execution_result.ms_error:
TypeError: Failed calling Meshgrid with "Meshgrid(indexing=string)(inputs=Tuple<List<Tensor, Tensor>>)".
The valid calling should be: 
"Meshgrid(indexing=<string>)(inputs=<list of tensor, tuple of Tensor>)".

----------------------------------------------------
- C++ Call Stack: (For framework developers)
----------------------------------------------------
mindspore\ccsrc\pynative\utils\pynative_utils.cc:815 mindspore::pynative::PyNativeAlgo::PyParser::PrintTypeCastErrorForPyObject
execution_result.tensorflow_error: InvalidArgumentError: {{function_node __wrapped__Pack_N_2_device_/job:localhost/replica:0/task:0/device:CPU:0}} Shapes of all inputs must match: values[0].shape = [3] != values[1].shape = [4] [Op:Pack] name: stack

llm_operation.reason: MindSpore报错因输入未构造为Tensor列表/元组，而是仅描述shape/dtype；TensorFlow报错因tf.meshgrid要求所有输入张量必须同shape（实际错误：Pack op要求输入shape一致，但meshgrid应允许多个不同长度1D张量）。需修复为真实Tensor输入，且确保MindSpore传list[Tensor]、TF传positional args。文档明确两者均支持不同长度1D输入，故错误源于测试用例未实例化张量。
